items.title: Trump pays writer E Jean Carroll $5m in damages over sexual abuse and defamation
items.dek: The president had sought to delay the payment as he tried to persuade the Supreme Court to overturn the judgement.
items.body: The president had sought to delay the payment as he tried to persuade the Supreme Court to overturn the judgement.

items.title: Tyrannosaurus rex most expensive dinosaur ever sold
items.dek: The dinosaur skeleton, which roamed the planet 67 million years ago, was sold by Sotheby's in New York.
items.body: The dinosaur skeleton, which roamed the planet 67 million years ago, was sold by Sotheby's in New York.
